children.heading: Award of scholarships, fellowships, and research internships
children.label: a Award of scholarships, fellowships, and research internships

children.text: The Foundation may award scholarships, fellowships, and research internships to eligible persons for study in the fields of the natural sciences, engineering, and mathematics. Such scholarships, fellowships, and research internships shall be awarded to persons as provided in this chapter who meet the minimum criteria established by the Foundation.

Scholarships shall be awarded to outstanding undergraduate students who intend to pursue careers in the natural sciences, engineering, and mathematics, which shall be prioritized for students attending community colleges and minority-serving institutions specified in .section 1067q(a) of this title
Fellowships shall be awarded to outstanding graduate students who intend to pursue advanced degrees in the natural sciences, engineering, and mathematics.

Research internships shall be awarded to outstanding undergraduate students who intend to pursue careers in the natural sciences, engineering, and mathematics, which shall be prioritized for students attending community colleges and minority-serving institutions specified in .section 1067q(a) of this title

The Foundation may provide, directly or by contract, for the conduct of nationwide competition for the purpose of selecting recipients of scholarships, fellowships, and research internships awarded under this chapter.

children.heading: Barry Goldwater Scholars and Research Interns
children.label: b Barry Goldwater Scholars and Research Interns
children.text: Recipients of scholarships and fellowships under this chapter shall be known as “Barry Goldwater Scholars”. Recipients of research internships under this chapter shall be known as “Barry Goldwater Interns”.

children.heading: Award of honoraria to volunteers
children.label: c Award of honoraria to volunteers
A
children.text: To two persons selected at large from each State.

children.label: B
children.text: To one person selected from each county in each State.

children.label: C
children.text: To persons affiliated with secondary schools on military reservations.

children.label: D
children.text: To persons affiliated with the dependent overseas school system.
The Board shall establish a schedule of honoraria to be awarded under paragraph (1).
